title: Internal Error when passing interface from array to a function virtual interface input

features.name: interface with modport declaration
features.description: Code should include an interface with a modport declaration having input/output signals

features.name: virtual interface typedef
features.description: Code should include a typedef creating a virtual interface type from an interface

features.name: function with virtual interface input parameter
features.description: Code should include a function that takes a virtual interface type as an input parameter

features.name: array of interface instances
features.description: Code should include an unpacked array of interface instances

features.name: interface array element passed to virtual interface function parameter
features.description: Code should include passing an interface array element as argument to a function expecting virtual interface input
